title: What’s happening this week in economics? - Deloitte

title: India proposes new rules to regulate news and political posts on social media - BBC
summary: The Indian government has unveiled new regulations aimed at controlling the dissemination of news and political content across social media platforms. These proposed rules seek to enhance oversight and accountability for information shared online within the country.
